raw_sql:
WITH director_roles AS (
  SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'
),
actor_roles AS (
  SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')
),
dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM director_roles)
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM actor_roles)
),
pairs AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, COUNT(*) AS film_count
  FROM dirs d
  JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
    AND t.kind_id = 1  -- movies only
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
)
SELECT
  nd.name AS director,
  na.name AS actor,
  p.film_count
FROM pairs p
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = p.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = p.actor_id
ORDER BY p.film_count DESC
LIMIT 30;

WITH dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
pairs AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, COUNT(*) AS film_count,
         array_agg(t.title ORDER BY t.production_year) AS titles
  FROM dirs d
  JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id AND d.director_id != a.actor_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
    AND t.kind_id = 1
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 8
)
SELECT
  nd.name AS director,
  na.name AS actor,
  p.film_count,
  p.titles[1:5] AS sample_titles
FROM pairs p
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = p.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = p.actor_id
ORDER BY p.film_count DESC
LIMIT 25;

WITH dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
pairs AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT d.movie_id) AS film_count
  FROM dirs d
  JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id AND d.director_id != a.actor_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id
    AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'countries')
    AND mi.info IN ('USA', 'UK', 'France', 'Germany', 'Italy', 'Spain', 'Australia', 'Canada')
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
    AND t.kind_id = 1
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.movie_id) >= 5
)
SELECT
  nd.name AS director,
  na.name AS actor,
  p.film_count
FROM pairs p
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = p.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = p.actor_id
ORDER BY p.film_count DESC
LIMIT 30;

WITH rated_movies AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT movie_id
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
    AND info::integer >= 500
),
dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
pairs AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT d.movie_id) AS film_count
  FROM dirs d
  JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id AND d.director_id != a.actor_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  JOIN rated_movies rm ON rm.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
    AND t.kind_id = 1
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.movie_id) >= 4
)
SELECT
  nd.name AS director,
  na.name AS actor,
  p.film_count
FROM pairs p
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = p.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = p.actor_id
ORDER BY p.film_count DESC
LIMIT 30;

WITH dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
rated_movies AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT movie_id
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
    AND info::integer >= 500
),
top_pairs AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, COUNT(DISTINCT d.movie_id) AS film_count,
         array_agg(DISTINCT d.movie_id) AS movie_ids
  FROM dirs d
  JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id AND d.director_id != a.actor_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  JOIN rated_movies rm ON rm.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND (d.director_id, a.actor_id) IN (
      -- Johnnie To / Lam Suet, Marshall / Elizondo, Miike / Endo, Rodriguez / Trejo, Egoyan / Khanjian, Kitano / Terajima
      (SELECT id FROM name WHERE name = 'To, Johnnie'),
      (SELECT id FROM name WHERE name = 'Marshall, Garry'),
      (SELECT id FROM name WHERE name = 'Miike, Takashi'),
      (SELECT id FROM name WHERE name = 'Rodriguez, Robert'),
      (SELECT id FROM name WHERE name = 'Egoyan, Atom'),
      (SELECT id FROM name WHERE name = 'Kitano, Takeshi')
    )
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.movie_id) >= 4
),
genres AS (
  SELECT tp.director_id, tp.actor_id, tp.film_count,
         mi.info AS genre,
         COUNT(*) AS genre_count
  FROM top_pairs tp
  JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = ANY(tp.movie_ids)
    AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  GROUP BY tp.director_id, tp.actor_id, tp.film_count, mi.info
)
SELECT
  nd.name AS director,
  na.name AS actor,
  g.film_count,
  g.genre,
  g.genre_count
FROM genres g
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = g.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = g.actor_id
WHERE g.genre_count >= 3
ORDER BY g.director_id, g.actor_id, g.genre_count DESC;

WITH dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
rated_movies AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT movie_id
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
    AND info::integer >= 500
),
top_director_ids AS (
  SELECT id, name FROM name
  WHERE name IN ('To, Johnnie', 'Marshall, Garry', 'Miike, Takashi',
                 'Rodriguez, Robert', 'Egoyan, Atom', 'Kitano, Takeshi')
),
top_pairs AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, COUNT(DISTINCT d.movie_id) AS film_count,
         array_agg(DISTINCT d.movie_id) AS movie_ids
  FROM dirs d
  JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id AND d.director_id != a.actor_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  JOIN rated_movies rm ON rm.movie_id = t.id
  JOIN top_director_ids tdi ON tdi.id = d.director_id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
    AND t.kind_id = 1
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.movie_id) >= 4
),
genres AS (
  SELECT tp.director_id, tp.actor_id, tp.film_count,
         mi.info AS genre,
         COUNT(*) AS genre_count
  FROM top_pairs tp
  JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = ANY(tp.movie_ids)
    AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  GROUP BY tp.director_id, tp.actor_id, tp.film_count, mi.info
)
SELECT
  nd.name AS director,
  na.name AS actor,
  g.film_count,
  g.genre,
  g.genre_count
FROM genres g
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = g.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = g.actor_id
WHERE g.genre_count >= 3
ORDER BY nd.name, g.genre_count DESC;

raw_sql:
WITH dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
rated_movies AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT movie_id
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
    AND info::integer >= 500
),
top_director_ids AS (
  SELECT id, name FROM name
  WHERE name IN ('To, Johnnie', 'Miike, Takashi', 'Rodriguez, Robert')
),
top_pairs AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, COUNT(DISTINCT d.movie_id) AS film_count,
         array_agg(DISTINCT d.movie_id) AS movie_ids
  FROM dirs d
  JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id AND d.director_id != a.actor_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  JOIN rated_movies rm ON rm.movie_id = t.id
  JOIN top_director_ids tdi ON tdi.id = d.director_id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
    AND t.kind_id = 1
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.movie_id) >= 4
),
genres AS (
  SELECT tp.director_id, tp.actor_id, tp.film_count,
         mi.info AS genre,
         COUNT(*) AS genre_count
  FROM top_pairs tp
  JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = ANY(tp.movie_ids)
    AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  GROUP BY tp.director_id, tp.actor_id, tp.film_count, mi.info
)
SELECT
  nd.name AS director,
  na.name AS actor,
  g.film_count,
  g.genre,
  g.genre_count
FROM genres g
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = g.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = g.actor_id
WHERE g.genre_count >= 3
ORDER BY nd.name, g.genre_count DESC;

WITH dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
rated_movies AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT movie_id
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
    AND info::integer >= 500
),
-- Focus on 5 well-known director-actor pairs from the top list
target_pairs AS (
  SELECT nd.id AS dir_id, na.id AS act_id, nd.name AS director, na.name AS actor
  FROM name nd, name na
  WHERE (nd.name, na.name) IN (
    ('To, Johnnie', 'Lam, Suet'),
    ('Marshall, Garry', 'Elizondo, Hector'),
    ('Egoyan, Atom', 'Khanjian, Arsinée'),
    ('Kitano, Takeshi', 'Terajima, Susumu'),
    ('Rodriguez, Robert', 'Trejo, Danny')
  )
),
shared_movies AS (
  SELECT tp.director, tp.actor, d.movie_id
  FROM target_pairs tp
  JOIN dirs d ON d.director_id = tp.dir_id
  JOIN acts a ON a.actor_id = tp.act_id AND a.movie_id = d.movie_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  JOIN rated_movies rm ON rm.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010 AND t.kind_id = 1
),
company_stats AS (
  SELECT sm.director, sm.actor,
         cn.name AS company,
         COUNT(DISTINCT sm.movie_id) AS shared_films
  FROM shared_movies sm
  JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = sm.movie_id AND mc.company_type_id = 1
  JOIN company_name cn ON cn.id = mc.company_id
  GROUP BY sm.director, sm.actor, cn.name
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT sm.movie_id) >= 2
  ORDER BY sm.director, shared_films DESC
)
SELECT director, actor, company, shared_films
FROM company_stats
LIMIT 40;

raw_sql:
WITH dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
rated_movies AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT movie_id
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
    AND info::integer >= 500
),
target_pairs AS (
  SELECT nd.id AS dir_id, na.id AS act_id, nd.name AS director, na.name AS actor
  FROM name nd, name na
  WHERE (nd.name, na.name) IN (
    ('To, Johnnie', 'Lam, Suet'),
    ('Marshall, Garry', 'Elizondo, Hector'),
    ('Egoyan, Atom', 'Khanjian, Arsinée'),
    ('Kitano, Takeshi', 'Terajima, Susumu'),
    ('Rodriguez, Robert', 'Trejo, Danny')
  )
),
shared_movies AS (
  SELECT tp.director, tp.actor, d.movie_id
  FROM target_pairs tp
  JOIN dirs d ON d.director_id = tp.dir_id
  JOIN acts a ON a.actor_id = tp.act_id AND a.movie_id = d.movie_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  JOIN rated_movies rm ON rm.movie_id = t.id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010 AND t.kind_id = 1
),
keyword_stats AS (
  SELECT sm.director, sm.actor,
         k.keyword,
         COUNT(DISTINCT sm.movie_id) AS kw_count
  FROM shared_movies sm
  JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = sm.movie_id
  JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
  GROUP BY sm.director, sm.actor, k.keyword
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT sm.movie_id) >= 2
)
SELECT director, actor, keyword, kw_count
FROM keyword_stats
ORDER BY director, kw_count DESC, keyword
LIMIT 50;

WITH dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')

acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id

  FROM target_pairs tp
  JOIN dirs d ON d.director_id = tp.dir_id
  JOIN acts a ON a.actor_id = tp.act_id AND a.movie_id = d.movie_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id

),

  SELECT sm.director, sm.actor,
         k.keyword,
         COUNT(DISTINCT sm.movie_id) AS kw_count
  FROM shared_movies sm
  JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = sm.movie_id
  JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
  GROUP BY sm.director, sm.actor, k.keyword
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT sm.movie_id) >= 2
)
SELECT director, actor, keyword, kw_count
FROM keyword_stats
ORDER BY director, kw_count DESC, keyword
LIMIT 60;

predicates: (((nd.name = 'To, Johnnie'::text) AND (na.name = 'Lam, Suet'::text)) OR ((nd.name = 'Rodriguez, Robert'::text) AND (na.name = 'Trejo, Danny'::text)))

raw_sql:
WITH dirs AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
),
acts AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress'))
),
rated_movies AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT movie_id
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes')
    AND info::integer >= 500
),
-- Compare genre diversity: repeat pairs (>=4 films) vs one-off pairs (exactly 1 film)
dir_ids AS (
  SELECT id FROM name
  WHERE name IN ('To, Johnnie','Marshall, Garry','Miike, Takashi',
                 'Rodriguez, Robert','Egoyan, Atom','Kitano, Takeshi')
),
all_pairs AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT d.movie_id) AS film_count,
         array_agg(DISTINCT d.movie_id) AS movie_ids
  FROM dirs d
  JOIN acts a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id AND d.director_id != a.actor_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  JOIN rated_movies rm ON rm.movie_id = t.id
  JOIN dir_ids di ON di.id = d.director_id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010 AND t.kind_id = 1
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
),
pair_genre_counts AS (
  SELECT ap.director_id, ap.actor_id, ap.film_count,
         COUNT(DISTINCT mi.info) AS distinct_genres
  FROM all_pairs ap
  JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = ANY(ap.movie_ids)
    AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  GROUP BY ap.director_id, ap.actor_id, ap.film_count
)
SELECT
  CASE WHEN film_count >= 4 THEN 'repeat (4+ films)'
       WHEN film_count = 1 THEN 'one-off (1 film)'
       ELSE '2-3 films' END AS pair_type,
  COUNT(*) AS num_pairs,
  ROUND(AVG(film_count), 2) AS avg_films,
  ROUND(AVG(distinct_genres), 2) AS avg_distinct_genres,
  ROUND(AVG(distinct_genres::numeric / film_count), 3) AS genre_diversity_ratio
FROM pair_genre_counts
GROUP BY CASE WHEN film_count >= 4 THEN 'repeat (4+ films)'
              WHEN film_count = 1 THEN 'one-off (1 film)'
              ELSE '2-3 films' END
ORDER BY avg_films DESC;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN (pair_genre_counts.film_count >= 4) THEN 'repeat (4+ films)'::text WHEN (pair_genre_counts.film_count = 1) THEN 'one-off (1 film)'::text ELSE '2-3 films'::text END)
